rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); FAIL iff total_hits >= 1

verdict_sentence: FAIL: 6 hits found (threshold=1). VolSched (arxiv 2507.10575) is an exact functional twin (sem=0.92, func=0.93) — literally triggers LR INCREASE on plateau detection via volatility ratio, the same state-triggered re-warm spike mechanism as SEGA-RAVANNE; GreedyLR, SPAM, Spike-No-More, WSD-river-valley, and dynamic LR tuning provide additional independent hits across kw/sem/func criteria. Candidate is not novel.
